messages.content: Always use code blocks with the appropriate language tags. If asked for a table always format it using Markdown syntax.

36
. Which component of a biosensor specifically recognizes and binds to the target
analyte?
a) Biorecognition Element
b) Transducer c) Signal Processing Unit d) Enzymes

The component of a biosensor that specifically recognizes and binds to the target analyte is:

```plaintext
a) Biorecognition Element
```
